headline: IPO Outlook: Popular E-commerce Company Wish, Plus Offerings From A Personal Loan Disruptor And A Biotech Firm
summary: After the huge IPOs from AirBnB Inc (NASDAQ: ABNB) and DoorDash Inc (NYSE: DASH) last week, the week of December 13 takes a slight breather with only three IPOs scheduled and one potential blockbuster.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech: 2 IPOs Plus FDA Decisions On Moderna's COVID Vaccine And Drugs From Amgen, MacroGenics
summary: Biotech stocks advanced for a third straight week, defying the broader market weakness. The space got solid support from positive  stock reactions  to presentations made at hematology and breast cancer conferences.

headline: Tesla To Shut Down Fremont Lines For Models S, X From Dec. 24 To Jan. 11
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) will be stopping production of the high-end Model S and Model X cars from December 24 to January 11 at its Fremont, California, factory.
